nasb.text: If she is a wall, We will build on her a battlement of silver; But if she is a door, We will barricade her with planks of cedar.”

esv.text: If she is a wall, we will build on her a battlement of silver, but if she is a door, we will enclose her with boards of cedar.

cnv.text: 她若是牆， 我們就要在她上面建造銀塔； 她若是門， 我們就要用香柏木板圍護她。

ccb.text: 她若是墙， 我们要在上面建造银塔； 她若是门， 我们要用香柏木板围护她。
